what_it_does: Records an image attachment entry in the design-assets channel, pointing to the image target image://design-assets/icons/V and noting when it was added.
observations: YAML front-matter metadata file with no body content
Target uses an image:// URI: image://design-assets/icons/V
standouts: Target URI uses a non-http image:// scheme
The icon path ends with a bare /V rather than a filename
notes: This file is a minimal ledger entry that registers an icon image attachment in the design-assets channel.
questions: What does the trailing /V in the target path represent (version, variant, or filename)?
Which channel message or asset record is this attachment attached to?
purpose_vs_actual: The file presents itself as an attachment metadata record and does exactly that.
intention_signals: To create a durable, typed pointer to a specific icon image so it can be located and associated with design-assets activity.
novelty: Use of an image:// URI scheme for the attachment target rather than a conventional file or HTTP URL.
contribution: A timestamped, typed record that links a channel attachment id to a design-assets icon image location.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment ledger entry att-08316b93 records an images-type attachment in the design-assets channel targeting image://design-assets/icons/V, added on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and reference a specific icon image asset within the design-assets channel.
